messages.content:
青幫我正確翻譯成繁體中文   Evaluation and Analysis of Adult Nursing Cases
 Case1 □Case2 □Case3 □Case4 
1. Chief Complaint:
The patient, Mr. Chen, is a 63-year-old male diagnosed with Type 1 diabetes since age 
15. He was brought into the ED semi-conscious with a glucose of 510 3 days ago. He 
was treated in the ED and then admitted to the Medical Unit for further stabilization 
and treatment. He has progressed well and stabilized following the healthcare 
provider’s orders. He is currently being prepared for discharge.

成人護理案例的評估和分析
 案例1 □案例2 □案例3 □案例4
1. 主訴：
患者陳先生，63歲男性，自15歲起被診斷出患有1型糖尿病。三天前，他被半昏迷帶入急診室，血糖值達到510。他在急診室接受治療後轉入內科病房進一步穩定和治療。按照醫療人員的指示，他進展順利並得以穩定下來。他目前正在準備出院。

請幫我正確翻譯成繁體中文2. Present Illness:
⚫ Type 1 diabetes
⚫ Diagnosed DKA with semi-conscious when visited ED

2. 現病史：
⚫ 1型糖尿病
⚫ 就診急診室時診斷為DKA，且處於半昏迷狀態

請幫我正確翻譯成繁體中文3. Past History:
⚫ Type 1 diabetes was diagnosed at age 15 with blood glucose control poorly
⚫ Allergies: No known drug allergies

3. 過去病史：
⚫ 15歲時被診斷出患有1型糖尿病，血糖控制不良
⚫ 過敏病史：未知藥物過敏史

請幫我正確翻譯成繁體中文Family History:
Married at age 23. His wife helped him with a proper diet, exercise, and monitoring 
blood glucose. At age 52, his company was downsized, and he lost his job. Two years 
later, his wife died of ovarian cancer. He became depressed and lost his home and the 
will to effectively manage his diabetes. He has lived on the street for the past four 
years. He visits the clinic sometimes to manage his diabetes, but he often misses his 
clinic visits.

家族病史：
23歲時結婚。妻子幫助他進行適當的飲食、運動和監測血糖。52歲時，他所在的公司縮編，失去了工作。兩年後，他的妻子因卵巢癌去世。他陷入了憂鬱症，失去了住所和有效管理糖尿病的意願。過去四年他一直流浪街頭。他有時會去診所管理糖尿病，但他常常錯過診所的就診。

請幫我正確翻譯成繁體中文Examination/Lab:
⚫ Vital Signs: HR 86, BP 110/70, RR 20, SpO2 98% on room air, Temp 37˚C
⚫ General Appearance: Appears older than the stated age
⚫ Cardiovascular: Sinus Tachycardia
⚫ Respiratory: Clear
⚫ GI: Normal bowel sounds, eating 100% of meals using carbohydrate counting
⚫ GU: Voiding
⚫ Extremities: Pink, warm, and with adequate turgor; movement is normal in all 
four extremities
⚫ Skin: Cool, dry, and pale, mucous membranes moist

體檢/檢驗：
⚫ 生命徵象：心率86、血壓110/70、呼吸頻率20、室溫下血氧飽和度98%、體溫37˚C
⚫ 一般外觀：看起來比實際年齡要老
⚫ 心血管系統：窦性頻脈
⚫ 呼吸系統：清晰
⚫ 腸胃系統：正常腸響音，使用碳水化合物計算攝取100%的餐飲
⚫ 泌尿系統：排尿正常
⚫ 四肢：呈粉紅色，溫暖，有適當的彈性；四肢運動正常
⚫ 皮膚：涼爽、乾燥、蒼白，黏膜濕潤

請幫我正確翻譯成繁體中文⚫ Neurological: Alert and oriented to person, place, and time Pupils equal, round,
and reactive to light and accommodation; no neurological deficits
⚫ Labs: Blood glucose 144
⚫ Fall Risk: Low risk for falls
⚫ Pain: Denies pain

⚫ 神經系統：警覺並能辨認人、地點和時間 瞳孔大小、圓形，對光和調節反應正常，無神經學缺陷
⚫ 檢驗：血糖值為144
⚫ 跌倒風險：跌倒風險低
⚫ 疼痛：否認有疼痛感

請幫我正確翻譯成繁體中文6. Medications/ Treatments:
⚫ Vitals every shift
⚫ Intake and Output every shift
⚫ Capillary blood glucose test:
◼ 30 minutes before each meal and 2 hours after each meal
◼ 30 minutes before bedtime 
⚫ Supplemental insulin for targeting blood glucose of 120.
⚫ Capillary blood glucose in the morning and at bedtime with PRN insulin
supplement
◼ 0-150 no coverage
◼ 151-200 2 units
◼ 201-250 4 units
◼ 251-300 6 units
⚫ Call a healthcare provider for blood glucose greater than 300 or less than 50
⚫ 1800 calorie diet
⚫ Diabetic nurse educator consultation
⚫ Dietitian consultation

6. 藥物/治療：
⚫ 每個班次測量生命徵象
⚫ 每個班次測量進食和排尿量
⚫ 每餐前30分鐘和每餐後2小時進行毛細管血糖測試
⚫ 每晚睡前30分鐘進行毛細管血糖測試
⚫ 使用補充胰島素以達到血糖目標值120
⚫ 早上和睡前進行毛細管血糖測量，如有需要，補充胰島素
◼ 0-150無需使用胰島素
◼ 151-200使用2單位胰島素
◼ 201-250使用4單位胰島素
◼ 251-300使用6單位胰島素
⚫ 血糖大於300或小於50時請立即通知醫療提供者
⚫ 每日攝取1800卡路里的飲食
⚫ 糖尿病護理師諮詢
⚫ 營養師諮詢

請幫我正確翻譯成繁體中文Capillary blood glucose in the morning and at bedtime with PRN insulin
supplement
◼ 0-150 no coverage
◼ 151-200 2 units
◼ 201-250 4 units
◼ 251-300 6 units
⚫ Call a healthcare provider for blood glucose greater than 300 or less than 50
⚫ 1800 calorie diet
⚫ Diabetic nurse educator consultation
⚫ Dietitian consultation

早上和睡前使用毛細管血糖測量，並根據需要補充胰島素
◼ 0-150 不需要補充
◼ 151-200 補充2單位
◼ 201-250 補充4單位
◼ 251-300 補充6單位
⚫ 血糖大於300或小於50時，請立即聯繫醫療提供者
⚫ 1800卡路里飲食
⚫ 糖尿病護理師諮詢
⚫ 營養師諮詢

請幫我正確翻譯成繁體中7. Key events( about 1 week or 1 month):
Mr. Chen has progressed his condition well, with blood glucose at 144. Currently, he 
is prepared to be home.

7. 重要事件（約1週或1個月內）：
陳先生的病情進展良好，血糖值為144。目前，他已準備好回家。
請幫我正確翻譯成繁體中8. Clinical Reasoning guide (Physiology, psychology, society):
8. 臨床推理指引（生理學、心理學、社會學）：
請幫我正確翻譯成繁體中9. Nursing Process(Except for case reports):
9. 護理過程（除了案例報告之外）：
請幫我正確翻譯成繁體中10. Questions preparation:
10. 問題準備：
謝謝您
不客氣，如果有任何其他問題，請隨時提出。我樂意幫助您。
